_comment: Local-only config for build:sync / build:all / watch. A plain `build` does NOT need this file. Copy it to builder.config.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your SavedVariables path(s).

_help.accounts: REQUIRED for sync/watch. Map each WoW account name to its TellMeWhen.lua SavedVariables file. List more than one only if you multi-box and want them kept in lockstep.
_help.profiles: OPTIONAL. Override the generated profile name per class. Default is "Menagerie <ClassName>" (e.g. "Menagerie Druid"). Example: { "druid": "Chancity Druid" }.
_help.paths: OPTIONAL advanced overrides: watchdir (source dir, default src/aio), template (default tmw-template.lua), savedvariables (a single sync target used instead of accounts).
